content.en:
Qingyuan Holy Land, located in the Dark Sanctuary Qingyuan Domain.

The Dark Sanctuary is very large and divided into many domains, such as the Battle Gate is located in the War Domain, and the War Ancestor Realm is the center of the War Domain.

The Qingyuan Domain is the territory of the Qingyuan Holy Land, which is one of the small domains, and many forces are attached to the Qingyuan Holy Land, including many city-level forces are also located in the Qingyuan Holy Land.

this day.

Ye Tian's copy body came to the Qingyuan Domain, crossed one giant city after another, and came to the Qingyuan Holy Realm.

At this time.

The Qingyuan Saint Realm was very lively, and a cultivator flew in and out at the entrances of multiple Saint Realm Worlds, which was very lively.

When Ye Tian appeared here, he was immediately discovered, but no one cared.

After all, there were quite a few people who came to the Qingyuan Holy Realm, and the Qingyuan Holy Land was not completely blocking the Qingyuan Holy Realm, so they just thought that Ye Tian was the same as everyone else.

Abrupt!

A spear appeared in Ye Tian's hand and stabbed fiercely at the Qingyuan Saint Realm.

Bang!!!!

The Qingyuan Saint Realm was actually pierced by Ye Tian's spear, and this spear penetrated into the interior of the Qingyuan Saint Realm, directly erasing a starry sky continent inside the Qingyuan Saint Realm.

Moreover, countless areas of the Qingyuan Saint Realm cracked, all of which were the effects of Ye Tian's blow.

"What the hell is going on?"

One by one, the invincible domain ancestors of the Qingyuan Holy Realm were alarmed, and even the Qingfeng Holy Lord of the Qingyuan Holy Realm was also alarmed, and one by one the divine consciousness came across the void and extended beyond the Qingyuan Holy Realm, seeing Ye Tian who made a move.

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, it's you!"

The Qingfeng Holy Lord appeared, and he was followed by a group of Invincible Domain Ancestors, all of whom were the Invincible Domain Ancestors of the Qingyuan Holy Land.

A two-step invincible domain ancestor, a dozen three-step invincible domain ancestors, dozens of four-step invincible domain ancestors, and a five-step invincible domain ancestor......

The dense Invincible Domain Ancestor formed a very turbulent momentum.

Ye Tian counted it at a glance, there were about a thousand invincible domain ancestors, even if the Qingyuan Holy Land had fallen, there were still many invincible domain ancestors.

That's what a holy place is all about!

"It's a little more than our Terran Invincible Domain Ancestor!"

Ye Tian didn't look down on these Invincible Domain Ancestors at all, don't look at the thousands of Invincible Domain Ancestors, if he wanted to make a move, he would be able to kill all these Invincible Domain Ancestors in an instant.

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, although you are the invincible domain ancestor of the Ten Great Holy Gate Battle Gates, but you provoke our Qingyuan Holy Land so much, this is not true, right?"

Qingfeng Domain Ancestor asked.

In fact, he knew what Ye Tian was here for, but he couldn't admit it.

"Qingfeng Holy Lord, when you sent two Invincible Domain Ancestors to our human race to snatch the saint-level ore veins, and asked the Weeping Blood Emperor to save people, didn't I dare to provoke your Qingyuan Holy Land?"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Nonsense, I haven't done this!"

The Blue Blade Holy Lord did not admit it.

"This is the Qingyuan Realm Bead of your Qingyuan Holy Land, and those two Invincible Domain Ancestors used this treasure to intercept the space where the saint-level ore veins were located. The Qingyuan Realm Bead is a sacred relic of your Qingyuan Holy Land, and it is only in the hands of the Qingfeng Holy Lord, doesn't it explain the problem?"

Ye Tian took the Qingyuan Realm Bead and questioned again.

The Qingfeng Holy Lord didn't panic at all, and hurriedly explained: "I did give the Qingyuan Realm Bead to a genius disciple to use, but I didn't expect that genius disciple to be killed outside, and I didn't expect that the murderer who killed our Qingyuan Holy Land disciple would actually snatch the saint-level ore vein of the human race." Thank you Wan Fa Domain Ancestor for returning the Qingyuan Realm Beads, I will definitely pay attention next time!"

"Qingfeng Holy Lord, do you want to kill you and don't admit it?"

Ye Tian sneered.

"Haven't done it, admit what?"

Blue Blade Holy Lord Road.

"Qingfeng Holy Lord, do you know what the truth of this world is?" Ye Tian asked.

"What?"

The Blue Blade Holy Lord sensed that something was wrong.

Ye Tian sneered: "That is, strength is everything, I don't need you to admit it, I have come up with evidence, that's enough, as for your refutation, it makes no sense." Because, I am stronger than you, and the battle gate behind me is my backer. Today, I will give you a choice in the Blue Blade Holy Land, execute the participants of the original plan, remember all the participants, and the executors, then I will leave today!"

The Qingfeng Holy Lord was furious: "Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor, don't go too far! no matter how weak our Qingyuan Holy Land is, it is also a Holy Land, and you are only an invincible Domain Ancestor, and you are not qualified to threaten our Qingyuan Holy Land!"

He was furious because he was the executor.

How could he have put himself to death?

"Die!"

Ye Tian made a move.

And the Blue Blade Holy Lord was not slow at all, and immediately transmitted the sound to make all the invincible domain ancestors take action one after another.

Bang!!!!!

The Qingfeng Holy Lord directly urged the holy relics of the Qingyuan Holy Land-Qingyuan Zhenkong Tower!

This is a top-level holy soldier who has condensed dozens of top-notch holy relics.

Rumble!!!!

Qingyuan Zhenkong Tower suppressed it, plus so many invincible domain ancestors made a move, including the Qingfeng Holy Lord, a two-step invincible domain ancestor, and more than a dozen three-step invincible domain ancestors, they could definitely suppress a one-step invincible domain ancestor.

And how long does it take for Ye Tiancai to break through and become an invincible domain ancestor, is it possible to compare it to an invincible domain ancestor in one step?

"Dirt Chicken Tile Dog!"

Ye Tian stabbed with a spear.

Boom!

Qingyuan Zhenkong Tower was directly knocked away by Ye Tian's spear.

Many Invincible Domain Ancestors vomited blood and crashed into the world barrier of the Qingyuan Saint Realm, and even the Qingfeng Holy Lord flew hundreds of millions of miles upside down, vomiting blood.

Just an ordinary blow, they can't withstand it.

"Escape into the Holy Realm!"

The Blue Blade Holy Lord spoke.

At this moment, Ye Tian performed his ancestral technique-Golden Silk!

One after another, golden rays pierced through the void, easily penetrating an invincible domain ancestor.

All the invincible domain ancestors who were hit disintegrated one by one, fell and died, and no amount of life-saving things could save their lives.

In the blink of an eye, thousands of Invincible Domain Ancestors fell to the point that there were only a dozen people left, and they were a little faster, and they entered the Qingyuan Saint Realm in time.

"Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor, you have destroyed the foundation of our Qingyuan Holy Land!!!

The Blue Blade Holy Lord roared.

"If you hadn't dealt with me at the beginning and hadn't killed our Terran Domain Ancestor, there would be no today!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Elder Taishang, please come out of the customs!"

"Elder Taishang, please come out of the customs!"

"Elder Taishang, please come out of the customs!"

One of the surviving Invincible Domain Ancestors of the Qingyuan Holy Land shouted, and his voice shook the Qingyuan Holy Realm.

The next moment.

A breath of the Superior Domain Ancestor permeated, and at this moment, many cultivators looked into the depths of the Qingyuan Holy Land.

The Supreme Elder of the Qingyuan Holy Land, there is no superior domain ancestor, and the Jinchen Holy Ancestor has appeared!
